SEARCH
Package grafiosch.exportdelete

Interface IExportMyDataAddon

All Known Implementing Classes:
BrokenConnectorHistoryExportAddon
public interface IExportMyDataAddon
Extension point that lets application modules contribute additional content to the personal-data export ZIP without the base module having to know about application-specific entities.

The base module (grafiosch-server-base) builds the export ZIP and must remain free of any application dependency. Implementations of this interface are discovered as Spring beans and consulted while the ZIP is being assembled. They can:

  • add extra rows to gt_data.sql via getAdditionalExportQueries(User) — useful when the rows to export depend on a runtime decision that a static ExportDefinition cannot express;
  • add standalone plain-text documents to the ZIP via getZipTextEntries(User) — for example a human-readable report about the exported data.

Both methods default to contributing nothing, so an implementation can override only the part it needs.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default List<AdditionalExportQuery>
    getAdditionalExportQueries(User user)
    Additional AdditionalExportQuerys whose rows are appended to gt_data.sql as INSERT statements.
    default Map<String,String>
    getZipTextEntries(User user)
    Additional plain-text documents to add to the export ZIP, keyed by ZIP entry name (the file name inside the archive, e.g.

  • Method Details

    • getZipTextEntries

      default Map<String,String> getZipTextEntries(User user) throws Exception
      Additional plain-text documents to add to the export ZIP, keyed by ZIP entry name (the file name inside the archive, e.g. "broken_history_connectors.txt"). The value is the full UTF-8 text content of the entry.
      Parameters:
      user - the user whose data is being exported
      Returns:
      a map of entry name to text content; empty by default
      Throws:
      Exception - if the content cannot be produced

    • getAdditionalExportQueries

      default List<AdditionalExportQuery> getAdditionalExportQueries(User user) throws Exception
      Additional AdditionalExportQuerys whose rows are appended to gt_data.sql as INSERT statements. Executed after the regular ExportDefinition-driven export, so any parent rows the returned rows depend on (e.g. securitycurrency for historyquote) are already present.
      Parameters:
      user - the user whose data is being exported
      Returns:
      the list of additional export queries; empty by default
      Throws:
      Exception - if the queries cannot be produced
